title: ServiceNow Change Request
description: A ServiceNow change request record used for managing planned changes to IT services and infrastructure within the ITSM Change Management process.

sys_id.description: The unique 32-character system identifier for the change request.

number.description: The human-readable change request number, prefixed with CHG.

short_description.description: A brief summary of the change.

description.description: A detailed description of the change and its purpose.

type.description: The change type: normal requires approval, standard uses pre-approved templates, emergency bypasses normal approval.

phase.description: The current phase of the change request.

risk.description: The assessed risk level of the change.

assigned_to.description: The user assigned to implement the change.

assignment_group.description: The group responsible for the change.

requested_by.description: The user who requested the change.

opened_by.description: The user who created the change request.

start_date.description: The planned start date and time for implementing the change.

end_date.description: The planned end date and time for the change implementation.

cmdb_ci.description: The configuration item affected by the change.

business_service.description: The business service impacted by the change.

justification.description: The business justification for the change.

implementation_plan.description: The plan for implementing the change.

backout_plan.description: The plan for reverting the change if problems occur.

test_plan.description: The plan for testing the change.

risk_impact_analysis.description: Analysis of the potential risks and impact of the change.

approval.description: The current approval status of the change.

cab_required.description: Whether the change requires a Change Advisory Board review.

close_code.description: The code indicating how the change was resolved.

close_notes.description: Notes recorded when closing the change request.

on_hold.description: Whether the change is currently on hold.

on_hold_reason.description: The reason the change is on hold.

active.description: Whether the change request is active.

opened_at.description: The date and time the change was opened.

closed_at.description: The date and time the change was closed.

sys_created_on.description: The date and time the record was created.

sys_created_by.description: The user who created the record.

sys_updated_on.description: The date and time the record was last updated.

sys_updated_by.description: The user who last updated the record.

sys_mod_count.description: The number of times the record has been modified.

ReferenceField.description: A ServiceNow reference field that can be a sys_id string or an object containing a link and value.

link.description: The API URL to the referenced record.

value.description: The sys_id of the referenced record.

display_value.description: The display value of the referenced record.
